name: Easy Hodge Podge Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger and onions.
2. Drain excess grease from the pan.
3. Add the contents of one tomato soup can to the pan, then add half a can of water.
4. Stir in the mixed vegetables.
5. Run a knife through the spaghetti to cut it into strands.
6. Add the spaghetti strands to the soup mixture.
7. Bring the soup to a boil and simmer for 15 minutes.
